hooks.command: echo 'Standing order (user settings hook): High-risk or Ledger-threshold work (3+ dependent steps or 3+ files) -> invoke the fable-mode skill at Scope before the first edit, and route reviews and hard judgments to the strongest available subagent tier with the model set explicitly. Trivial tasks proceed without it.'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SubagentStart","additionalContext":"Standing order (user hook): verify claims by execution where executable, source-grounding the rest and naming which; label findings verified/inferred/assumed with the check run; report all findings with confidence, do not pre-filter; after any edit, run the relevant check and quote its decisive line. Cap: 2 failed attempts at the defined check -> stop, report the failure and diff as-is; tool failures do not count toward the cap. Never manufacture a pass (weakened assertions, skipped tests, re-run-until-green, or a narrower command reported as the defined check). A failing check has two suspects - the code and the check: before any edit that makes a failing check pass, produce the INTENT line in your report - INTENT: code does X / check expects Y / spec (README/docstring/type) says Z - authority: user > spec > tests > code; task framing is not intent, and the three disagreeing is itself the finding to surface, never silently reconcile. Trivial lookup? Just answer accurately."}}'

export LC_ALL=C; INPUT=$(cat); PROMPT=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | node -e 'process.stdin.setEncoding("utf8");let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c).on("end",()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const p=j.prompt;process.stdout.write(typeof p==="string"?(p.length?p:"__EMPTY__"):"__EMPTY__")}catch(e){process.stdout.write("__EMPTY__")}})' 2>/dev/null); NODE_RC=$?; if [ $NODE_RC -ne 0 ]; then [ -n "$INPUT" ] && echo 'Prompt classifier DEGRADED (node missing or broken) - classifier inactive until Node.js is restored on PATH.'; exit 0; fi; [ -n "$PROMPT" ] || exit 0; if printf '%s' "$PROMPT" | grep -qiE '(authoriz|authenticat|oauth|\bauth\b|password|jwt|bearer|access.?token|refresh.?token|api.?key|credential|login|sign.?in|rotat|secret|payment|billing|migrat|schema|database|deploy|release|publi(sh|c)|concurren|race condition|data race|thread|dependenc|upgrad|\bbump|security|encrypt|\btls\b|\bssl\b|certificat|inject|production|refactor|architect|redesign|invest|debug|root cause|audit|\breview|implement|feature|rewrite|overhaul|improv|enhanc|thorough|codebase|pipeline|integrat|endpoint|delet|truncat|\bdrop\b|wipe|purge|backfill|force.?push|rebase|revert|reset.?--?hard|\brestore\b|\bbackup\b|chmod|chown|permission|leak|optimi|perform|latency|speed.?up|\bslow\b|think hard|rigorous|fable|tournament|innovat|agentic|analy[sz]|deep.?dive|\bstock|\betf\b|portfolio|valuation|backtest|thesis|dataset|regression|simulat|statistic|experiment|\bhooks?\b|\bmcp\b|claude\.?md|settings\.(local\.)?json|\bskills?\b|scheduled.?task|\bcron\b|\bautomat|\bmemor|\brememb|\bdose|dosage|clinical|\bpatient|\bdiagnos(is|es|e|ed|ing)\b|contraindic|prescri|symptom|medicat|dentist|\bdental\b)' || [ ${#PROMPT} -gt 700 ]; then echo 'Prompt classifier (user hook): this prompt may be High-risk or multi-step work -> invoke the fable-mode skill at Scope before the first edit, and route reviews and hard judgments to the strongest available subagent tier with the model set explicitly. Genuinely trivial? Proceed without it.'; fi
